Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Reroute at Chicago/Homan
ShortDescription: #66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to police activity near Chicago/Homan.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#66 Chicago buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Chicago, Kedzie, Augusta, Hamlin, Chicago and over normal route, due to police activity near Chicago/Homan. 

Allow extra travel time.
